payload.answer: I can treat this as a new preference statement, but I won’t commit it here. If you want, I can offer options for how to record it.
citations: I usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email
repair_options: Add as a separate morning-reading preference: prefers reading technical papers before checking email.
Keep both if there are multiple related preferences, without merging them into one statement.
If this is meant to replace an older preference, provide the older one so it can be compared for possible supersession.
